positive: A central, minimalist, and highly stylized illustration of a celestial cityscape at dawn. The scene depicts futuristic skyscrapers integrated with bioluminescent flora, soaring through vibrant, gradient skies of deep indigo, soft magenta, and burnt orange. The style is clean vector art mixed with neo-art deco poster aesthetic, offering stark silhouettes against vibrant gradients. Key elements include stylized moons, orbiting geometric constellations, and glowing river paths. Use strong directional lighting emphasizing contrast and clean lines, perfect for a monochromatic yet richly colored print on fabric. High detail, vibrant color palette, centralized composition, ideal for screen printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, artifacts, oversaturated
